summary: Traditionally; the most senior Khan serves as head

mechanics.name_guess: Traditionally; the most senior Khan serves as head
mechanics.breadcrumb_path: Rules Compendium > Page 192 > lore > Traditionally; the most senior Khan serves as head
mechanics.excerpt: Traditionally; the most senior Khan serves as head the Clan, overseeing relationships between castes and with other Clans The junior Khan called the saKhan; acts as the Clan'$ warlord_ The exact distribution these tasks depends the Clan and Khans in question The Khans of each Clan compose the Clan Grand Council, The Grand Council meets when required to resolve disputes Trlal of Bloodright Perhaps the most significant trial for warriors _ victory in Trial of Bloodright grants the right to use Bloodname and earns tne warrior DNA place in the eugenics program.
